allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: add full version range support to SemverRange

Add four new backwards-compatible SemverRange types: lower_bound \(>=/>\),
upper_bound \(<=/<\), intersection \(space-separated AND\), and union
\(||-separated OR\). This enables lossless representation of complex
semver ranges that were previously lossy-compressed by convert-range.js.

SemverRange now natively parses comparator operators, hyphen ranges,
x-ranges, and composite range expressions. convert-range.js is
simplified to a thin wrapper since SemverRange handles all syntax
directly, removing the semver npm dependency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: add TypeScript definitions, remove convert-range

Add comprehensive index.d.ts covering the full public API for both
Semver and SemverRange classes, including v2 range types \(bounds,
intersection, union\). Remove convert-range.js since SemverRange now
natively handles all Node semver range syntax.

Closes #3

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
